overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through golden grasslands at sunset. The character moves from a forested overlook through a tree grove and down to the coast, with the setting sun creating a warm backlit silhouette throughout the journey.

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily downhill through foliage toward a coastal settlement visible in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of traditional Japanese buildings and tents near the shore
bright orange sun low on the horizon creating strong backlighting
dense tree branches and leaves framing the view

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a forested hill overlooking a coastal settlement bathed in golden sunset light. The character walks forward through dense vegetation with the settlement visible to the left and the setting sun directly ahead.

events.description: enters a dense grove of trees from the open overlook

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow tree grove with the setting sun creating lens flare through the trunks

entered.detail: tall thin tree trunks silhouetted against the sun
tall thin tree trunks creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a dense tree grove where tall trunks line both sides of the path. The coastal settlement disappears from view as the trees occlude the sightline, while the setting sun filters through the branches creating dramatic lens flare.

events.description: exits the tree grove into open grasslands
location text 'KISHI GRASSLANDS' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: walking through tall golden grass down a gentle slope toward the coastline, with the grass swaying in the wind

entered.detail: dense field of golden tall grass swaying in the wind
calm ocean water reflecting the orange sunset
rocky coastline formations visible along the shore

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the trees, the scene opens into the vast Kishi Grasslands with tall golden grass stretching toward the coast. The character descends the slope toward the water as the sun continues to set, with rocky cliffs visible along the distant shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a forested overlook that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched coastal grassland. It begins with the samurai walking through dense vegetation on a hill, with a coastal settlement visible to the left under the glow of a golden sunset. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a dense grove of tall trees that occlude the settlement and filter the sunlight into dramatic lens flares. The camera then follows the samurai as he emerges from the woods, where the environment expands into the wide Kishi Grasslands filled with tall golden grass. Finally, the character descends the slope toward the water, revealing rocky cliffs along the distant shoreline as the sun continues to set.
